channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ten years after Brexit, the U.K. marks a lost decade
item.description: On June 23, 2016, the Brexit referendum unleashed a populist tide that reshaped Western politics. Ten years later, a diminished and fractured...

item.title: The most costly primaries you've never heard of are raging on D.C.'s doorstep
item.description: Two little-known U.S. House races in Maryland suburbs near Washington, D.C., are becoming some of the most expensive congressional primaries.

item.title: Democrats' Jeffries and Mamdani wings face off in New York
item.description: New York's congressional primaries on Tuesday will test the strength of the left-wing movement challenging the Democratic establishment.

item.title: Haberman and Swan's "Regime Change": How Trump became "untethered" in second term
item.description: Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan discuss the main themes of their book on President Trump's second term, "Regime Change," out Tuesday.
